name: Raspberry Pi (any model with GPIO)
description: Main compute board that runs Linux and controls GPIO.

name: Breadboard
description: Lets you build and test circuits without soldering.

name: Jumper wires
description: Male/female jumpers for connecting GPIO pins to components.

name: LED kit
description: Single-color LEDs for visual alerts and status indicators.

name: Resistor kit
description: Includes common resistor values for pull-up/down and LED protection.

name: Momentary push button
description: Basic tactile switch for user input.

name: DHT22 sensor
description: Measures temperature and humidity with simple digital output.

name: BME280 sensor
description: Measures temperature, humidity, and pressure over I2C.

name: 1-channel relay module
description: Switches external loads like lamps, fans, and pumps.

name: PIR motion sensor
description: Detects motion by sensing infrared changes.

name: Servo motor
description: Rotates to specific angles via PWM control.

name: Raspberry Pi camera module
description: Captures photos/video using CSI interface.

name: HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor
description: Measures distance using ultrasonic pulses.

name: 0.96" I2C OLED display
description: Compact display for status dashboards and readouts.

name: WS2812B NeoPixel strip
description: Addressable RGB LEDs for effects and visualizations.

name: Small powered speaker
description: Audio playback for alerts and voice responses.

name: USB microphone
description: Captures audio for speech commands or analysis.

name: Capacitive soil moisture sensor
description: Reads moisture levels for plant-watering automations.

name: RTC module (DS3231)
description: Maintains accurate time even without network connectivity.

name: High-endurance microSD card
description: Reliable storage for logs, images, and long-running projects.
